name: content-forge
description: Testing plugin for campaign ideas, message iteration, and lightweight content planning.

interface.shortDescription: Shape rough ideas into tighter content and campaigns
interface.longDescription: Use Content Forge to turn a loose content brief into stronger positioning, outline options, and polished draft directions for marketing or creator work.
defaultPrompt: Turn this brief into three content angles.
Tighten this launch copy and improve the hook.
Draft a short content plan for this product announcement.
